subject: Create SQL migration file with 7 schema tables
description:
Create packages/schemas/sql/0001_init.sql with:
1. source_document - source registry with license info
2. text_unit - Quran ayat and hadith items  
3. evidence_span - byte offsets with hash verification
4. kg_entity - knowledge graph entities
5. kg_edge - edges with evidence requirement
6. kg_edge_evidence - junction table for edge-span links
7. rag_query, rag_retrieval_result, rag_validation, rag_answer - RAG pipeline logs

Follow docs/CANONICAL_IDS.md for ID formats and ensure provenance chains with source_id links throughout.
